name: Stratford Athletics Track (Olympic Park)
metaTitle: Stratford London Marathon Community Track | Facility Info & Wind Speed
metaDescription: Check live wind speed and facility information for the Stratford London Marathon Community Track in Stratford.

trackInfo.heading: Opening Times
trackInfo.text: Open for public use on Thursdays 16:30 – 19:00. Note that the track is frequently used for events and school sessions; check ahead for closures.

trackInfo.heading: Entry Price
trackInfo.text: Approximately £3.20 per person. Please note that payments are card/cashless only. No advance booking is required.

trackInfo.heading: Track Details
trackInfo.text: A world-class 6-lane 400m synthetic track with an 8-lane 110m straight, located in the Queen Elizabeth Olympic Park.

trackInfo.heading: Parking Details
trackInfo.text: Very limited on-site parking. It is strongly recommended to use public transport via Stratford Station or Hackney Wick.

trackInfo.heading: Address
trackInfo.text: London Stadium, Queen Elizabeth Olympic Park, London, E20 2ST

trackInfo.heading: Website
trackInfo.text: Visit the official London Stadium community track page for the latest opening updates and FAQs.
